place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Single-Storey Pool Villa, Bophut, Koh Samui
note: Fully staffed · private chef · + tax & service
blurb: A tranquil 1,002 m² beachfront villa in a managed residence estate at Bophut, built as a collection of single-storey pavilions around a sea-facing 12-metre infinity pool that glows at night. Four bedrooms, a Thai-style gazebo with beach access, and a private chef. Six minutes to Fisherman’s Village, three to Bophut Beach.
detail:
A tranquil 1,002 m² beachfront villa that invites guests to slow down and embrace island life, set within a managed residence estate at Bophut. The four-bedroom home is just a six-minute drive to Fisherman’s Village and a three-minute walk to Bophut Beach.

The property is a collection of elegant single-storey pavilions that blend indoor and outdoor living. A carved wooden gate opens into lush tropical gardens leading to a sea-facing 12-metre infinity pool that glows beautifully at night, with views toward Fisherman’s Village. The pool-facing living pavilion holds a spacious lounge with a deep L-shaped sofa, Smart TV and a dining area for ten, complemented by a fully equipped modern kitchen and breakfast bar.

Each bedroom features a TV, personal safe and en-suite with a rain shower; the largest has a canopied four-poster bed, sea view, dressing area and a large bathtub, with bright tropical decor and teak furnishings throughout. Fully staffed for comfort, with a dedicated villa manager and a private chef preparing Thai, Asian and Western cuisines, plus a Thai-style gazebo with beach access and kayaks and a BBQ on request. The shoreline in front of the estate is rocky; a short 200-metre stroll brings you to a swimmable stretch of beach.

features.l: Kayaks & BBQ on request · 6 min to Fisherman’s Village
